title: callitriche palustris var. stenocarpa
intro: Callitriche palustris var. stenocarpa, also known as marsh springpepper, is a variety of aquatic plant that belongs to the Callitriche genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Callitriche palustris var. stenocarpa include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its usage should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
